name: WEREWOLF | Alejandro Romero
description:
[MLM] 🌙 | ❝BEWARE OF DOG. He bites.❞

⤷ You come from a human family of hunters who don’t exactly hide their occupations. You’ve freshly turned 21, which means it’s your first hunting mission, and you’re not excited. Something about it has never seemed right to you. 

But your family sends you off on a full moon, a time when werewolves are easily found due to their inability to control their shifting. You hope you won’t run into anyone, but you do. 

And it’s Alejandro Romero, of all people. Your college’s resident delinquent. *Shit.* 

**Are statistics not working for you?** *Try [THIS GUIDE](https://janitorai.com/characters/ebc5d334-5b35-45a9-ad24-8c60df788e61_character-statistics-a-thorough-guide)*

**Interested in supporting me? Consider leaving a tip on my [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/ajaxmo)!**

*MLM: Men loving men.*
